reasoning: Candidate (RIGHT): the controls card itself presents a warm sandy-parchment background with a colorful gem-corner decorative border and small pixel art icons inside. This reads toy-diorama, cozy, Nintendo-adjacent — broadly in-tone for the warm/whimsical/fairy-tale target. However, the peer reference panel (LEFT) reveals the broader project asset palette: a large dungeon tileset grid saturated with dark stone, blood-red stains, lava/fire, cages, and desaturated grimdark tones. This is a strong out-of-tone signal at the project level — the dungeon tiles read as a Western dungeon-crawler or rogue-lite, not a bright/sunny Hyrule or wholesome toy-diorama world. The candidate card survives in isolation, but the surrounding asset context shows meaningful tonal drift away from the Echoes-of-Wisdom/Zelda target. Score reflects: card itself ~8, project tonal context pulls it down to 6. Flagging as marginal pending review of whether the dark tiles are intended as a contrast/sub-zone or represent uncorrected drift.
